name: uniqBy
description: The standalone lodash.uniqby package as a vendorable file. Useful when you want lodash's iteratee-based uniqueness behavior without an npm dependency.
summary: This page ships the published lodash.uniqby file in both raw and normalized forms. The value is to preserve lodash's iteratee-driven uniqueness behavior inside your repo.
nativeAlternative: Set can deduplicate primitive values, but iteratee-based uniqueness with stable ordering takes more care if you want lodash-compatible behavior.

variants.label: Normalized
variants.note: Rule-based normalization for modern TS projects. The goal is easier import and build compatibility, not changed behavior.

variants.label: Raw
variants.note: Published package file kept as-is for older teams or repos that still prefer the original CommonJS distribution.

note: Raw and normalized views are both available. Use normalized when you want an ESM and TypeScript-friendly file, and raw when you want the original published package shape.
